codeReview.summary: The fix improved milestone-aware/default report selection in the verification script, but it still does not wire enforcement into validator runtime finalization; enforcement remains procedural/doc-driven and can be skipped.

issues.description: The implementation still relies on documentation guidance ('script MUST be called') instead of integrating the check into validator runtime finalization logic. In the fix commit diff, only `.factory/library/user-testing.md` and `.factory/library/verify-flow-report-finalization.sh` changed, and repo-wide references to `verify-flow-report-finalization.sh` are only docs/script locations, so validators can still report success without this enforcement being executed by runtime.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned skill remains mismatched for validator-infrastructure work, which increases irrelevant procedure overhead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Feature metadata uses `skillName: switcher-integration-worker` for both the original failed feature and this fix feature (`features.json`), while the implemented changes are in `.factory/library/*` validator infrastructure.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared-state documentation still does not identify the concrete validator runtime enforcement integration point, encouraging doc/script-only fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission `AGENTS.md` is switcher-scoped and `.factory/library/architecture.md` covers product architecture but not user-testing validator runtime ownership. The fix again changed only `.factory/library/user-testing.md` and `.factory/library/verify-flow-report-finalization.sh`.

summary: Review failed. Compared both original and fix diffs: the fix addresses milestone-specific default report configuration but does not resolve the original blocking failure (runtime finalization still does not enforce required flow-report existence).
